seo.title: Potato and Leek Soup - Marinda Kook

html:
Potato and Leek Soup

Ingredients

  • 4 large potatoes, sliced into rings
  • 30 ml butter
  • 1 onion, finely chopped
  • 3 cloves garlic, finely chopped
  • 2 leeks (the white part), finely sliced
  • 10 ml cumin
  • 5 ml curry powder
  • 1,25 ml good vegetable stock
  • 125 ml cream
  • Salt and pepper
  • Full-cream unflavoured yoghurt for on top
  • Spring onion for garnishing

Method

  1. Fry the onion and leek in the butter until glassy. Add the finely chopped garlic and fry for about a minute
  2. Add the cumin and curry powder and fry quickly
  3. Now add the stock and potatoes to the pot with the onions and cook until nice and soft. Salt and pepper to taste
  4. Blend smooth in a food processor.
  5. Put back in the pot and stir through the cream.
  6. Spoon into a pretty bowl and drizzle a little yoghurt over. Garnish with the finely chopped spring onion.
  7. You can also serve croutons alongside.
